news.t: Firm Capital Apartment REIT Provides Q1/2026 Results

holdings.infoBox: FCA is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings.

overview.description: The First Trust China AlphaDEX Fund (FCA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX China index. The fund tracks the Defined China Index. The alpha-seeking index employs a quantitative methodology to select stocks based on both value and growth factors. FCA was launched on Apr 18, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Value investor Bill Nygren gets bullish on tech
data.text: Oakmark Funds portfolio manager Bill Nygren joins "Squawk Alley" to discuss where he sees the markets heading and what he thinks are the top picks in some sectors.
